title: Cathis (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cathis''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Cathis system]]''', a [[star system]] located in the [[Jjannex sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Cathis system/Legends|Cathis system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Jjannex sector/Legends|Jjannex sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]
**'''[[Cathis Rebel starfighter base]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] base

{{Disambig}}
